# services.zabbixProxy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.zabbixProxy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Whether to create a local database automatically. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.host` | `string` | Database host address. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.name` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | A file containing the password corresponding to {option}`database.user`. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Database host port. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.socket` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the unix socket file to use for authentication. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.type` | `one of "mysql", "pgsql", "sqlite"` | Database engine to use. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.database.user` | `string` | Database user. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Zabbix Proxy. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Packages to be added to the Zabbix {env}`PATH`. Typically used to add executables for scripts, but can be anything. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.listen.ip` | `string` | List of comma delimited IP addresses that the trapper should listen on. Trapper will listen on all network interfaces if this parameter is missing. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.listen.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Listen port for trapper. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.modules` | `attribute set of package` | A set of modules to load. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the Zabbix Proxy. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.package` | `package` | The Zabbix package to use. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.server` | `string` | The IP address or hostname of the Zabbix server to connect to. |
| `services.zabbixProxy.settings` | `attribute set of (signed integer or string or list of string)` | Zabbix Proxy configuration. Refer to <https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/manual/appendix/config/zabbix_proxy> for details on supported values. |
